title: Money Laundering
summary: This U.S. Treasury page on money laundering is a navigation hub listing various illicit finance risk assessments and reports from 2006-2024. It contains no specific market-moving data, rate decisions, or macro catalyst content beyond a general description of Treasury's anti-money laundering mission through the Office of Terrorism and Financial Intelligence.
key_points: Page is a listing/navigation hub for Treasury illicit finance publications, not a standalone research document
Contains links to National Money Laundering Risk Assessments, Terrorist Financing Risk Assessments, and Proliferation Financing Risk Assessments from 2015-2024
No specific monetary policy decisions, rate information, or market-moving figures are present in the source text
Mission statement describes Treasury's approach to combating money laundering through the Office of Terrorism and Financial Intelligence (TFI)
Individual reports listed may contain relevant data but are not included in this source text
Source provides no economic data releases, forecasts, or forward guidance relevant to market analysis
why_it_matters: This page is not actionable for market structure or macro catalyst research. It is an index page listing historical reports on illicit finance risk assessments but contains no information that would affect equity, bond, FX, or commodity markets.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page with no substantive content
No published date provided for the page itself
